description: Letter from ʿAyyāsh b. Ṣadaqa, Alexandria, to Yūsuf b. Mūsā al-Taharti. Dating: ca. 1050. The writer deals with managing the goods of the brothers Yūsuf and Barhūn (b. Mūsā) in Alexandria. He advises them on how to deal with the shipments of linen and whether the rumors about the sinking of several ships is true. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #483) VMR
description_he: מכתב מעייאש בן צדקה, מאלכסנדריה, ליוסף בן מוסא אל-תהרתי, כ-1050, על ניהול מטענים ומשלוחי פשתן
